site.name: National Academy of the Security Service of Ukraine
site.description: The National Academy of the Security Service of Ukraine is the only higher military educational institution in Ukraine specializing in counterintelligence. It trains counterintelligence officers, philologists-translators, and information security experts for the Ukrainian intelligence service.

home.aboutText1: The National Academy of the Security Service of Ukraine is the only higher military educational institution in Ukraine specializing in counterintelligence. It trains counterintelligence officers, philologists-translators, and information security experts for the Ukrainian intelligence service.
home.aboutText2: The Academy was established on January 27, 1992, by a resolution of the Cabinet of Ministers of Ukraine. On August 2, 1999, by Decree of the President of Ukraine, the SSU Academy was granted the status of National.
home.newsSubtitle: Current events and activities of the Academy
home.ctaTitle: Steps to Become a Cadet at the SSU Academy
home.ctaText: It trains counterintelligence officers, philologists-translators, and information security experts for the Ukrainian intelligence service

about.title: About the Academy
about.subtitle: The only higher military educational institution in Ukraine specializing in counterintelligence
about.missionText1: The Academy's mission is to create the conditions necessary for obtaining higher and postgraduate education, as well as for conducting research in the interests of strengthening Ukraine's national security and ensuring the effective fulfillment of state security tasks.
about.missionText2: The Academy plays an active role in shaping the development and public image of the Security Service of Ukraine. It is a leader among higher education institutions in the security and defense sector and lays the foundation for attaining the status of a research university in the future.
about.missionText3: Values: Quality, Professionalism, Commitment, Innovation, Creativity, Integrity, Responsibility of all participants in the educational process.

missionCards.title: Mission
missionCards.text: To create the conditions necessary for obtaining higher and postgraduate education, as well as for conducting research in the interests of strengthening national security

missionCards.title: Vision
missionCards.text: A leader among higher education institutions in the security and defense sector, laying the foundation for attaining the status of a research university

missionCards.title: Personnel
missionCards.text: The Academy was established on January 27, 1992. Many graduates of the Academy today head units of the Service or other law enforcement agencies

about.historyTitle: Stages of the Academy's Formation and Development
about.historySubtitle: Key milestones in the Academy's development

milestones.text: Establishment of the Institute for Training Personnel
milestones.detail: January 27, 1992 – By resolution of the Cabinet of Ministers of Ukraine, the Institute for Training Personnel of the Security Service of Ukraine (ITP SSU) was established. In 1992, the first intake of cadets – future operational officers – took place.

milestones.text: Reorganization into the Academy of the SSU
milestones.detail: November 17, 1995 – The Institute for Training Personnel of the SSU was reorganized into the Academy of the Security Service of Ukraine. Since 1996, the Academy began training cadets according to the specialty of Translation with proficiency in two foreign languages.
August 2, 1999 – By decree of the President of Ukraine, the Academy of the SSU was granted National status. 2004 – The Academy began training specialists in the field of Information Security.

Since 2012 – The Academy has started training reserve officers. Since 2014, with the onset of russia's armed aggression graduates of the SSU National Academy have been defending with arms in their hands, the territorial integrity and independence of Ukraine.

In 2015 the first early graduation of cadets took place; students voluntarily completed their studies ahead of their schedule to join the defense of the country in the area of the Anti-Terrorist Operation (ATO) as quickly as possible.

In August 2021, as a result of structural reforms within the SSU Academy, the Institute was reorganized into the Educational and Research Institute of Information Security and Strategic Communications. Cybersecurity and Strategic Communications Centers were established within its structure.

about.structureSubtitle: Educational and Research Institutes of the Academy
departments: Educational and Research Institute of Humanities — training cadets in K1 'State Security', K3 'National Security', B11 'Philology'
Educational and Research Institute of State Security — training, retraining, and professional development of security and defense sector specialists
Educational and Research Institute of Information Security and Strategic Communications — training students in cyber security, information protection, and law

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.subtitle: Steps to Become a Cadet or Student of the SSU National Academy
admissions.stepsSubtitle: Steps to Become a Cadet at the SSU Academy

steps.title: Free of charge education
steps.text: State-funded education and the opportunity to receive financial support (scholarship)

steps.title: Full material support
steps.text: Free dormitory accommodation, three meals a day, uniform and equipment, medical care at the departmental medical facility

steps.title: Unique professional training
steps.text: Legal and special disciplines, foreign languages, military and specialized physical training

steps.title: 100% employment
steps.text: After graduation, all cadets continue military service in the SSU bodies and units with the military rank of Lieutenant

admissions.requirementsSubtitle: Who the Academy is looking for
requirements: Motivated patriots – those for whom 'patriotism' is not a pompous word but a sincere desire to serve and contribute to the state and society

Strong individuals – those for whom military training, subordination, and discipline are realities that must be encountered after admission. If you have willpower and are ready to overcome difficulties, adaptation will be easier
Eager to learn – there will be a lot of new and unusual material, so, your willingness and readiness to learn is the key to success and professionalism
Responsible and persistent – those who are not afraid of challenges, can prioritize, and complete what they start
Physically fit/active – it is advisable to develop love for sports even before entering the Academy, as physical training is given special attention to throughout the years of study

specialties.name: State Security
specialties.degree: Counterintelligence activities in the field of state security

specialties.name: National Security
specialties.degree: Counterintelligence protection of state cybersecurity and critical infrastructure facilities

specialties.name: Philology (by specializations)
specialties.degree: Translation in the field of state security

admissions.datesSubtitle: Institute of Information Security and Strategic Communications (funded by individuals and legal entities)

Law: Information Security Law; Information Law

education.title: Education
education.subtitle: Educational and Research Institutes of the Academy

programs.level: Educational and Research Institute of Humanities
programs.description: The Educational and Research Institute of Humanities provides training of cadets in accordance with the following subject areas: K1 'State Security', K3 'National Security', and B11 'Philology'. In line with the needs of the Security Service of Ukraine, the Academy has developed a unique training program. Over four years, higher education students master more than 40 disciplines, including specialized, legal, military-tactical subjects, physical training, foreign languages, strategic communications, etc.

programs.level: Educational and Research Institute of State Security
programs.description: An important component of the effective functioning of Ukraine's state security system is the qualified professional training of the SSU personnel – patriots of the state who can think and act unconventionally and creatively, and who are capable of applying modern theoretical achievements to the practical activities of the Ukraine's Security Service.

programs.level: Educational and Research Institute of Information Security and Strategic Communications
programs.description: Protection of the information and cyber domain is an integral component of state security. The security and defense sector requires specialists capable of creating an effective system of cyber protection for the country's information resources in conditions of information confrontation and external aggression. For this reason, training specialists in the field of information security is one of the priority areas of activity of the SSU National Academy.
specialties: Organization of Protection of Restricted Information

education.featuresSubtitle: To ensure effective and comprehensive training of future SSU personnel, all necessary conditions have been created

features.title: Specialized computer classrooms
features.text: Forensic science and counterintelligence rooms, linguistic laboratories

features.title: An electronic firing simulator
features.text: An off-site training facility, sports and fitness halls

features.title: Language training
features.text: Departments of Romance-Germanic, Eastern, and East European languages. 12 foreign languages are studied at the Academy

features.title: CISCO Networking Academy
features.text: Students gain practical experience in configuring and administering network equipment and receive internationally recognized certificates

features.title: SSU Internships
features.text: Future counterintelligence officers and translators improve their knowledge and skills during operational exercises and internships in the units of the Central Directorate and regional bodies of the SSU

features.title: Specialized and general libraries
features.text: A unified resource information and technology center equipped with the latest equipment, an e-library of foreign language literature, a distance learning platform

education.scheduleText: The Security Service of Ukraine is developing cooperation with law enforcement agencies and intelligence services of foreign countries, as well as leading international organizations. Within this framework, the SSU National Academy actively participates in projects with international SSU partners. The main goal is to study and implement the experience of European countries and NATO member states in the training of security sector personnel.

scheduleStats.label: foreign languages studied at the Academy

science.title: Research
science.subtitle: Key areas of scientific research at the Academy are as follows
science.directionsSubtitle: Key areas of scientific research at the Academy

directions.title: Activities of the SSU during special periods
directions.text: Countering intelligence-sabotage and diversionary-intelligence activities of the russian federation's intelligence services and its satellites against Ukraine

directions.title: Protection of state sovereignty
directions.text: Protection of state sovereignty, constitutional order, and territorial integrity; defense and scientific-technical potential; economic, cyber, and information security of the state; and critical infrastructure facilities

directions.title: Improving counterterrorism security
directions.text: Improving counterterrorism security in Ukraine under the legal regime of martial law

directions.title: Documentation of crimes
directions.text: Documentation and investigation of crimes against the foundations of national security and russian war crimes

directions.title: Countering hostile propaganda
directions.text: Countering hostile propaganda under the legal regime of martial law. Search, collection, processing, analysis, and use of open-source information in the interests of ensuring state security

directions.title: Reforming and strengthening SSU capabilities
directions.text: Operational and combat training system for the SSU personnel according to NATO standards. Sanctions policy to deter russian aggression. Analyzing the genesis of state security provision in Ukraine

publications.title: "HERALD OF CRIMINAL JUSTICE"
publications.description: Scientific and practical journal, Category 'B' professional publication in specialty 081 'Law'
publications.frequency: Co-founded by Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv, National Academy of Internal Affairs, National Academy of the Security Service of Ukraine

science.councilsText: The SSU Academy hosts Specialized Academic Council SRD 26.706.02 for the defense of doctoral and candidate dissertations with restricted access classifications in the following specialties:

councilsStats.label: ensuring state security of Ukraine (legal sciences) (K1 State Security)
criminal procedure and criminalistics, forensic examination, operative-investigative activities (legal sciences) (D8 Law)
